section_miscategorizations.text: The patient has a vitamin D deficiency.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is stated as an existing lab-based condition without any interpretive language suggesting diagnostic uncertainty or synthesis; it reads as a direct report of an objective lab finding and would more clearly belong with the vitamin D lab result in the Objective section.

section_miscategorizations.text: The doctor believes the patient's liver enzymes will improve once they lose weight.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a prognostic/interpretive assessment about the relationship between liver enzymes and weight loss rather than a concrete management action; it fits better as part of the clinician's assessment, though its placement in the plan is not highly misleading.
